zh.lifeSummary: 當Lord Robert ap Llywarch of Cydewain於大約1110年出生在英國威爾斯蒙格莫利夏爾時，他的父親Llywarch ap Trahaearn41歲，母親Dyddgu verch Iorwerth61歲。他與Dyddgu ferch Madog在威爾士結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1171年在英國威爾斯蒙格莫利夏爾蒙哥馬利享年62歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lord Robert ap Llywarch of Cydewain于大约1110年出生在英国威尔斯蒙格莫利夏爾时，他的父亲Llywarch ap Trahaearn41岁，母亲Dyddgu verch Iorwerth61岁。他与Dyddgu ferch Madog在威尔士结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1171年在英国威尔斯蒙格莫利夏爾蒙哥馬利享年62岁。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch: occupational name for a cobbler.
Slovenian: nickname for a talkative person, from lapati ‘to babble’, or a topographic name from dialect lap ‘abyss’. Compare Lapp 4.

variants.name: Lapp
meanings: German, English, and Dutch: from Middle High German and Middle English lappe, Middle Dutch lap ‘cloth, patch, rag’, a metonymic occupational name for a mender of clothes or shoes, or a nickname given to someone who wore ragged clothes or garments with loose folds, flaps, or hanging sleeves, or who had fleshy folds of skin on his face, neck, or body.

German: nickname for a simple-minded person, from Middle Low German lappe ‘fool’. This surname (in any of the two possible senses; see also 1 above) is also found in France (mainly Alsace, also Lorraine).
English: nickname from Anglo-Norman French lappe ‘burdock’, perhaps for someone with a prickly character.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Lord Robert ap Llywarch of Cydewain was born about 1110, in Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Llywarch ap Trahaearn, was 41 and his mother, Dyddgu verch Iorwerth, was 61. He married Dyddgu ferch Madog in Wales. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1171, in Montgomery, Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lord Robert ap Llywarch of Cydewain est né environ 1110, à Montgomeryshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Llywarch ap Trahaearn, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Dyddgu verch Iorwerth, avait 61 ans. Il a épousé Dyddgu ferch Madog à Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1171, à Montgomery, Montgomeryshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 62 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lord Robert ap Llywarch of Cydewain um 1110 in Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Llywarch ap Trahaearn 41 und seine Mutter Dyddgu verch Iorwerth 61. Er hat in Wales Dyddgu ferch Madog geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1171 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Montgomery, Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lord Robert ap Llywarch of Cydewain è nato il circa 1110 nel Montgomeryshire, Galles, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Llywarch ap Trahaearn, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Dyddgu verch Iorwerth, aveva 61 anni. Lui sposato Dyddgu ferch Madog nel Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1171, nel Montgomery, Montgomeryshire, Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 62 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lord Robert ap Llywarch of Cydewainが約1110年にイギリスウェールズモントゴメリシュアイアで生まれた時，父Llywarch ap Trahaearnは41歳，母Dyddgu verch Iorwerthは61歳であった。ウェールズでDyddgu ferch Madogと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1171年にイギリスウェールズモントゴメリシュアイアモントゴメリーで62歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lord Robert ap Llywarch of Cydewain(이)가 대략 1110년 영국 웨일스 몽고머이실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Llywarch ap Trahaearn(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Dyddgu verch Iorwerth(은)는 61세였다. 그는 웨일스에서 Dyddgu ferch Madog(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1171년 영국 웨일스 몽고머이실르 몽고메리에서 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lord Robert ap Llywarch of Cydewain nasceu aproximadamente 1110, em Montgomeryshire, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Llywarch ap Trahaearn, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Dyddgu verch Iorwerth, tinha 61 anos. Ele casou-se com Dyddgu ferch Madog em Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1171, em Montgomery, Montgomeryshire, Gales, United Kingdom, com 62 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lord Robert ap Llywarch of Cydewain родился около 1110 г. в местности монтгомиришир, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Llywarch ap Trahaearn было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Dyddgu verch Iorwerth, 61. Он женился на женщине по имени Dyddgu ferch Madog в местности Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1171 г. в местности монтгомири, монтгомиришир, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 62 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lord Robert ap Llywarch of Cydewain nació aproximadamente 1110, en Montgomeryshire, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Llywarch ap Trahaearn, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Dyddgu verch Iorwerth, tenía 61 años. Se casó con Dyddgu ferch Madog en Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1171, en Montgomery, Montgomeryshire, Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 62 años.
